message:
fix(record): tighten symbolic obligation tracker registration and cleanup

Two categories of improvements:

1. Visibility reduction: SymbolicObligation constructors (new_send_object,
   new_send_symbol, new_acknowledge, new_decode) narrowed from pub(crate)
   to private. All construction goes through SymbolObligationTracker.

2. Tracker strictness:
   - register() now asserts region match and no duplicate IDs instead of
     silently replacing existing obligations
   - New assert_registration_valid() helper for the invariant checks
   - New remove_obligation() helper centralizes removal + index cleanup
   - resolve() and check_leaks() use remove_obligation()
   - pending_for_symbol() now filters to only pending obligations
   - check_leaks() collects IDs first, then removes (avoids borrow issues)
   - abort_expired_epoch() uses same remove-then-mutate pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -252,7 +252,7 @@ pub struct SymbolicObligation {
 impl SymbolicObligation {
     /// Creates a new obligation for sending an object.
     #[must_use]
-    pub(crate) fn new_send_object(
+    fn new_send_object(
         id: ObligationId,
         object_id: ObjectId,
         params: &ObjectParams,
@@ -282,7 +282,7 @@ impl SymbolicObligation {
 
     /// Creates a new obligation for sending a single symbol.
     #[must_use]
-    pub(crate) fn new_send_symbol(
+    fn new_send_symbol(
         id: ObligationId,
         symbol_id: SymbolId,
         holder: TaskId,
@@ -309,7 +309,7 @@ impl SymbolicObligation {
 
     /// Creates a new obligation for acknowledging receipt.
     #[must_use]
-    pub(crate) fn new_acknowledge(
+    fn new_acknowledge(
         id: ObligationId,
         object_id: ObjectId,
         expected_count: u32,
@@ -337,7 +337,7 @@ impl SymbolicObligation {
 
     /// Creates a new obligation for decoding.
     #[must_use]
-    pub(crate) fn new_decode(
+    fn new_decode(
         id: ObligationId,
         object_id: ObjectId,
         min_symbols: u32,
